fieldValues.value: RFC-011 Change A: Add lifecycleStates to SectionSource.type-query

Add optional lifecycleStates?: string[] to SectionSource.type-query. When present and non-empty, the query result MUST include only Records whose lifecycleState matches one of the listed values (multi-value OR semantics). When absent or empty, all lifecycle states are included. Requires ext:lifecycle to be declared; implementations that do not declare ext:lifecycle MUST treat this field as absent. Invariant I-011-1.

Replaces the single-value lifecycleState field with a multi-value array, enabling queries like include only draft and active. The singular lifecycleState field remains as a back-compat single-state filter; lifecycleStates is the preferred form when multiple states are needed.
